constraints.rule: grid frequency MUST stay in 49.8-50.2 Hz
operating reserve MUST stay > 5% of demand
no blackout allowed under any circumstance

focus.what: Balancear red ante rampa solar +12% en 15min

objective.goal: Mantener frecuencia en 49.95-50.05 Hz con reserva > 5%

work.current: freq=50.18 Hz subiendo, solar ramping, reserve=4.8%

step.action: Curtail solar 8% y dispatch gas peaker 200MW

claims.statement: AGC responde en < 30s a eventos de rampa

limits.limit: max ramp rate 10 MW/min para gas peaker
